meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: API Integration Guide to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Learn how to build high-value API integrations using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress clients and ship fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by building functional, high-utility API integrations. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you can build a production-grade tool in hours. This demonstrates technical competence and problem-solving ability, shifting the conversation from 'what have you done' to 'what can you build' for me.
content.intro:
The blank page is a freelance developer's silent killer. You have the skills, but without a concrete showcase, clients see risk instead of reliability. The market doesn't care about your resume; they care about your ability to bridge the gap between their messy data and a clean, automated result.

We are going to dismantle the 'no portfolio' barrier by building a high-impact API integration. Using Antigravity to scaffold the logic and Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting, we’ll turn a technical challenge into a polished, professional case study that proves you can ship production-ready code under pressure.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Integration
steps.description: Select a common business problem, like syncing Stripe invoices to Notion. This demonstrates immediate ROI for potential clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a robust architecture for a middleware that authenticates with Stripe API and pushes payment success events to a Notion database. Include error handling and rate limiting strategies.

steps.title: Scaffold the API Gateway
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. This saves hours of configuration and ensures best practices are baked in from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Node.js Express server with TypeScript, structured for clean architecture. Include environment variable management and a secure webhook listener for Stripe.

steps.title: Implement API Client Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the specific API client calls, ensuring clean separation of concerns and type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer for Stripe API interactions using the official SDK. Ensure all calls are wrapped in try-catch blocks with custom error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/services/stripe.service.ts --instruction 'Implement Stripe API client with error handling'

steps.title: Test with Mock Data
steps.description: Before hitting live APIs, simulate the flow to ensure your data transformation logic is airtight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a mock testing suite for the integration. Simulate a Stripe webhook payload and verify the expected Notion database update structure.

steps.title: Deploy and Document
steps.description: Package the project into a professional portfolio piece with a README that highlights the 'why' behind your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional README.md for this project that emphasizes the business value, the architecture design, and how to scale this solution for enterprise clients.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file README.md --context 'Portfolio showcase for freelance clients'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Future Scalability' section in your README to show clients you think beyond the immediate task.
Use environment-specific logging to demonstrate your understanding of production-grade monitoring.
Document your API error handling strategy; it shows you prioritize system stability over quick hacks.
Structure your commits as a story: 'Fix bug' is bad, 'Implement idempotent Stripe webhook handler' is professional.
Add a 'How to Deploy' section in your docs; it proves you understand the full lifecycle, not just writing code.
content.next_steps: Host your code on GitHub, write a one-page case study on your website, and start pitching this specific solution to businesses currently using the platforms you integrated.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Create your own authority by building tools that solve real problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
